fields.heading: Why Choose Vigil Care Staffing as Your Staffing Agency
fields.body: Fully CQC-compliant staffing provider Flexible staffing options – temporary, long-term, or emergency cover Rigorous recruitment – enhanced DBS checks, references, and mandatory training Fast response – we provide cover 24/7, including weekends and holidays Sector expertise – we understand the specific needs of health and social care providers

fields.heading: Who We Work With
fields.body: a wide range of clients across the health and social care sector, including: Nursing Homes Residential Care Homes Supported Living Facilities Mental Health Services Local Authorities

items.q: What types of care professionals do you supply?
items.a: Our care agency specialises in Healthcare Assistants, Support Workers, and Cleaners for care homes, supported living, and nursing facilities.
Yes. Every professional from our care agency is fully vetted, DBS-checked, and trained to meet CQC standards.
Absolutely. We offer 24/7 emergency staffing as part of our responsive care agency service.
You can call, email, or complete our online request form. A member of our care agency team will respond quickly with suitable options.

fields.body: Our Services A reliable care agency is essential for ensuring that care homes, nursing homes, and supported living services receive skilled, compassionate, and professional staff.

Our Core Services Healthcare Assistants (HCAs): Personal care support – assisting with washing, dressing, mobility, and meals Companionship and emotional support for residents Medication assistance under appropriate supervision Support Workers: Mental health and learning disability support to promote independence One-to-one support for individuals with complex needs Encouraging community participation and life skills development Cleaners (Health & Social Care): Infection control and hygiene maintenance Providing a safe, clean, and comfortable environment Fully trained in health and social care cleaning procedures Our care agency carefully matches each staff member to your setting, ensuring the right fit for your team and service users.

Availability That Suits Your Schedule Monday – Friday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM Saturday: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM Sunday: Closed For urgent staffing requests, our office offers out-of-hours and weekend coverage to ensure continuous care delivery Get In Touch Today FREE Quote (FAQs) Frequently Asked Question (FAQs) What types of care professionals do you supply?

How do I apply for a role with your care agency? Visit our job vacancies page, submit your CV, and our recruitment team will contact you with suitable opportunities. Contact Us Looking for a trusted care agency to support your staffing needs? Get in touch today for a free consultation.

At Vigil Care Staffing, we are a trusted recruitment agency specialising in the recruitment and supply of CQC-compliant Healthcare Assistants , Support Workers , and Cleaners to meet the increasing demands of the health and social care sector.

Check Availability Why Choose Vigil Care Staffing as Your Staffing Agency Fully CQC-compliant staffing provider Flexible staffing options – temporary, long-term, or emergency cover Rigorous recruitment – enhanced DBS checks, references, and mandatory training Fast response – we provide cover 24/7, including weekends and holidays Sector expertise – we understand the specific needs of health and social care providers When you choose Vigil Care Staffing, you’re choosing an agency that puts quality, compliance, and care at the centre of every placement FREE Quote Who We Work With We supports a wide range of clients across the health and social care sector, including: Nursing Homes Residential Care Homes Supported Living Facilities Mental Health Services Local Authorities Whether you’re managing a large residential care service or a small, supported living provision, our team is ready to assist.
